_action: DO NOT EDIT — update canonical source instead. See docs/SSOT/governance/GOVERNANCE_MAP.md

rules.description: AI must ALWAYS suggest improvements when friction, gaps, contradictions, or missing coverage are detected during work. Suggestions must be placed at the END of the response in a section titled 'Suggested improvements'. AI must NOT ask permission before suggesting.

docs/CODE-REVIEW.md must ALWAYS be updated in the same operation when: a new package is added, architecture changes, a security layer is added or modified, test strategy changes, or a new trade-off is documented. Must also update 'Last updated' date and 'What is Not Yet Implemented' section.

Prefer: (1) built-in .NET features, (2) Microsoft-supported libraries, (3) widely-used libraries with strong AI training coverage. Avoid: niche libraries, unnecessary abstraction layers, patterns that increase cognitive load. Always evaluate long-term maintainability and AI readability.
ALL code must compile with ZERO warnings. Warnings must be fixed immediately in the same operation. Includes: compiler warnings, nullability warnings, analyzer warnings (xUnit1051, CA-rules etc.).
All PowerShell commands must run inline in the current terminal. NEVER open new windows. NEVER use Start-Process for command execution.
NEVER construct file paths by manually concatenating strings from directory listings. ALWAYS use .FullName from the actual object (e.g. (Get-ChildItem ...).FullName). ALWAYS use absolute paths.

When something is marked as SSOT: the entire repo must be scanned for contradictions, contradictions must be removed or replaced with a link to the SSOT, and SSOT must be the single source of truth. Marking as SSOT is not complete until all contradictions are resolved.
When SSOT index files exist for a topic, they must be consulted FIRST before any grep or file search. grep_search is for searching source code only, not for navigating documentation or SSOT files.
After every E2E test run: report pass/fail summary, then ask the user whether a ZIP export package should be created for external analysis.

All forbidden patterns defined in 04_ANTI_PATTERNS.json must be actively enforced. Any violation detected in new or modified code must stop execution immediately and be reported to the user before any further code is written.
